sources.title: Flexera 2024 State of Cloud Cost Management
FinOps Foundation: Cloud Financial Management Framework

result.summary: Organizations waste an average of 32% of cloud spend on idle or oversized resources, with FinOps practices reducing total cloud costs by 20-35% through reserved instances, rightsizing, and automated scaling without impacting application performance.
key_findings: Compute costs represent 58% of total cloud spend with average utilization of only 27%, indicating massive rightsizing opportunity through instance type optimization and spot instance adoption
Reserved Instances and Savings Plans deliver 40-72% cost reduction but require 1-3 year commitments; optimal coverage is 60-70% reserved with 30-40% on-demand for flexibility
GPU/AI workloads are the fastest-growing cost category at 4.2x YoY, with inference costs representing 80-90% of ML infrastructure spend vs training at 10-20%
